{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/131139636?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/liyander/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/liyander/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/liyander/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/liyander/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/liyander", "id": 131139636, "login": "liyander", "node_id": "U_kgDOB9EINA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/liyander/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/liyander/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/liyander/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/liyander/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/liyander/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/liyander", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-89", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')"}], "description": "### Summary
A SQL injection vulnerability exists in `FilterDataServiceCE.java` where the `dropTable` method constructs a SQL `DROP TABLE` statement using string concatenation with the table name. If the table name is derived from user input, this allows for arbitrary SQL command execution.

### Details
The vulnerability is located in `app/server/appsmith-interfaces/src/main/java/com/appsmith/external/services/ce/FilterDataServiceCE.java`.

Line 627 in `dropTable` method:
```java
public void dropTable(String tableName) {
    String dropTableQuery = "DROP TABLE " + tableName + ";";
    executeDbQuery(dropTableQuery);
}
```

The `tableName` argument is concatenated directly into the SQL string without validation or escaping.

### PoC
If `dropTable` is exposed to user input (e.g., via a utility API that accepts a table name to clean up), an attacker could provide a value like:
`valid_table; DROP TABLE users; --`

The resulting query would be:
`DROP TABLE valid_table; DROP TABLE users; --;`

This would delete the intended table and then delete the `users` table (or execute any other injected SQL).

### Impact
*   **Type:** SQL Injection
*   **Impact:** Data Loss (Drop Table), potentially Data Exfiltration or Modification depending on database permissions.
*   **Who is impacted:** Appsmith server instances.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h8cj-hpmg-636v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T20:59:45Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h8cj-hpmg-636v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h8cj-hpmg-636v"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-29T20:59:45Z", "references": ["https://github.com/appsmithorg/appsmith/security/advisories/GHSA-h8cj-hpmg-636v", "https://github.com/appsmithorg/appsmith/commit/c8023ba4b3b54204ff3309c9e5c33664ad15ba32", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h8cj-hpmg-636v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/appsmithorg/appsmith/security-advisories/GHSA-h8cj-hpmg-636v", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/appsmithorg/appsmith", "summary": "appsmith has SQL Injection in FilterDataService via Unsafe DROP TABLE Execution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-29T20:59:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h8cj-hpmg-636v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.99", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.appsmith:interfaces"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.98"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: appsmith has SQL Injection in FilterDataService via Unsafe DROP TABLE Execution
